subject: New text message from solomon (503) 381-6911
body_text:
<https://voice.google.com>
Marcella (payee) said mom doesn't get enough to pay rent on her own. Julio
made up the difference and you just kicked him out
YOUR ACCOUNT <https://voice.google.com> HELP CENTER
